name: Habit Tracker & Coach
description: Track habits and get coaching on building better routines

agents.name: Habit Coach
agents.purpose: Analyze habit data and provide coaching advice
agents.system_prompt_hint: Review the user's habit tracking data. Identify streaks, missed days, and patterns. Provide motivational coaching, suggest improvements, and celebrate wins. Use behavioral science principles.

suggestion_card.subtitle: Track habits and get daily coaching
